result.stdout:
Description:
  R3E WebGUI Deploy Tool - Deploy Neo contract WebGUIs to R3E hosting service

Usage:
  R3E.WebGUI.Deploy [options]

Options:
  --contract-address <contract-address> (REQUIRED)  The deployed contract address (0x...)
  --contract-name <contract-name> (REQUIRED)        The name of the contract
  --network <network>                               The network where the contract is deployed (testnet, mainnet) [default: testnet]
  --deployer-address <deployer-address> (REQUIRED)  The address of the deployer
  --webgui-path <webgui-path> (REQUIRED)            Path to the WebGUI files directory
  --service-url <service-url>                       URL of the R3E WebGUI hosting service [default: https://api.r3e-gui.com]
  --description <description>                       Description of the contract WebGUI
  --version                                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  R3E WebGUI Deploy Tool - Deploy Neo contract WebGUIs to R3E hosting service

Usage:

Options:
  --contract-address <contract-address> (REQUIRED)  The deployed contract address (0x...)
  --contract-name <contract-name> (REQUIRED)        The name of the contract
  --network <network>                               The network where the contract is deployed (testnet, mainnet) [default: testnet]
  --deployer-address <deployer-address> (REQUIRED)  The address of the deployer
  --webgui-path <webgui-path> (REQUIRED)            Path to the WebGUI files directory
  --service-url <service-url>                       URL of the R3E WebGUI hosting service [default: https://api.r3e-gui.com]
  --description <description>                       Description of the contract WebGUI
  --version                                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                    Show help and usage information
